name: Holy Family Memorial
description_short: Holy Family Memorial Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering loans, savings accounts, and digital banking services with rates as low as 4.00% APR on auto loans.
description_long:
Holy Family Memorial Credit Union (HFMCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving healthcare professionals and their families. The organization emphasizes financial wellness tailored to the healthcare industry, positioning itself as a partner that "cares for you while you care for others." The credit union has deep historical roots in its community, with references to 25+ years of membership and a commitment to member-owner relationships rather than shareholder profits.

HFMCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (starting at 4.00% APR), mortgage loans (starting at 5.00% APR), share savings accounts (up to 2.00% APY), share certificates (up to 3.957% APY), and health savings accounts (HSAs). The institution provides digital banking through a mobile app for account access and management "anywhere, anytime." They also issue their own credit cards and partner with Brella for ATM/debit card services. Membership requires a $30 minimum deposit to open a Share/Savings Account, making entry accessible to prospective members.

What distinguishes HFMCU is its specialized focus on healthcare professionals with a "financial timeline" concept addressing life events and career stages unique to that industry. The credit union emphasizes member service quality and has recently invested in a website platform upgrade. Their promotional messaging highlights rapid approval processes, 90-day payment deferrals on select loans, and refinancing options. The organization maintains active member communication through a CEO letter and community news updates.

As a credit union, HFMCU operates under NCUA insurance rather than FDIC, making deposits equally safe but limiting the institution to member-owned, not-for-profit status. Their website reveals strong product offerings and competitive rates, though specific membership eligibility criteria beyond the healthcare professional focus are not fully detailed. The organization demonstrates genuine commitment to member financial wellness rather than maximizing profits, a fundamental credit union advantage.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.00% APR
Mortgage loans with rates starting at 5.00% APR
Share savings accounts with dividends up to 2.00% APY
Share certificates with rates up to 3.957% APY
Mobile banking app for account management
Financial wellness programs for healthcare professionals
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.00% APR with fast approval and refinancing options available
Mortgage loans starting at 5.00% APR for home purchase and refinance needs
Share certificates offering competitive rates up to 3.957% APY
Low $30 minimum deposit to establish membership and open accounts
Mobile app for 24/7 account access and money management
Specialized financial wellness programs tailored to healthcare professionals
90-day payment deferral option on select loans
cons: Membership appears partially restricted to healthcare professionals, limiting eligibility for general consumers
Limited transparency on website regarding specific membership requirements and healthcare affiliation verification
Website does not clearly specify whether there are membership fees or monthly maintenance charges
No detailed information provided about loan denial rates, credit score requirements, or underwriting criteria
Health Savings Account eligibility requires prior employer verification, adding administrative burden
best_for: Healthcare professionals (doctors, nurses, hospital staff) seeking specialized financial services
Healthcare industry employees looking for tailored financial wellness planning and products
Borrowers seeking lower auto loan and mortgage rates with fast approval processes
Savers seeking competitive yields on share certificates and savings accounts
diagnosis: Holy Family Memorial Credit Union is best for healthcare professionals and their families seeking competitive loan rates and member-focused financial services in a not-for-profit credit union structure. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility appears partially restricted to the healthcare industry, which may limit accessibility for general consumers, though the website does not explicitly state membership requirements or affiliation verification processes.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Holy Family Memorial — NCUA-insured credit union in Manitowoc, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
